zh.lifeSummary: 當Roderick MacLeod 7th of Lewes於1420年出生在蘇格蘭洛-爾易斯爾 本 劉易斯時，他的父親Roderick MacLeod 10th of the Lewes-79歲，母親dau Morison-83歲。他於1454年之前與Margaret Borb McLeod在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1598年在蘇格蘭阿吉爾托比爾莫利享年178歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾。

nameMeanings.name: MacLeod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLeod
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Leòid ‘son of Leòd’, a patronymic from a Gaelic form of Old Norse Liótr ‘ugly’, a common personal name in medieval Norway and Iceland.

History: This is the name of a major Scottish Hebridean clan, associated in particular with Dunvegan on the isle of Skye; also, historically, with the island of Lewis. There are two main branches: the McLeods of Harris and Dunvegan (Sìol Tormoid) and the McLeods of Lewis (Sìol Torcaill). Both branches claim descent from a certain Leòd (Norse: Liótr), who lived in the 13th century. — One prominent bearer of this prominent Scottish name, Alexander McLeod (1774–1833), a Reformed Presbyterian clergyman, author, and editor, emigrated to the US in 1792 from the island of Mull in the Hebrides.

nameMeanings.name: Roderick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + rīc ‘power’. This name was introduced into England, in slightly different forms, first by Scandinavian settlers in the Danelaw and later by the Normans. However, it did not survive beyond the Middle English period. It owes its modern use to a poem by Sir Walter Scott , The Vision of Don Roderick ( 1811 ), where it is an Anglicized form of the related Spanish name Rodrigo, borne by the last Visigothic king of Spain, whose vision is the subject of the poem. It is now also very commonly used as an Anglicized form of two unrelated Celtic names: Scottish Gaelic Ruairidh and Welsh Rhydderch (see respective appendices).

en.lifeSummary: When Roderick MacLeod 7th of Lewes was born in 1420, in Isle of Lewis, Ross-shire, Scotland, his father, Roderick MacLeod 10th of the Lewes, was -79 and his mother, dau Morison, was -83. He married Margaret Borb McLeod before 1454, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1598, in Tobermory, Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 178, and was buried in Argyll, Scotland.

Il a épousé Margaret Borb McLeod avant 1454, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1598, à Tobermory, Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 178 ans, et a été enterré à Argyll, Écosse.

ko.lifeSummary: Roderick MacLeod 7th of Lewes(이)가 1420년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 이슬일 프 루이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roderick MacLeod 10th of the Lewes(은)는 -79세였고, 그의 어머니 dau Morison(은)는 -83세였다. 그는 1454년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Margaret Borb McLeod(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1598년 스컷랜드 아그이 토버모리에서 178세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roderick MacLeod 7th of Lewes родился в 1420 г. в местности исл оф львис, росс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Roderick MacLeod 10th of the Lewes было -79 год, а матери, которую звали dau Morison, -83. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Borb McLeod перед 1454 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1598 г. в местности тобирмори, аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 178 лет и был похоронен в местности аргилл, Шотландия.
